trigger.Name: Proverka_cin
trigger.script:
TActivate( "Nachalo_cin" ) TActivate( "Nachalo2_cin" ) TActivate( "Povorot_cin" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_Koch_cin" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_Koch_cin
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Koch_Kavkaz_3_quest1") and not(IsQuestComplete("Koch_Kavkaz_3_quest1")) then
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(2989.288, 230.950, 1203.464), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local vehLinkID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local CTochID = GetEntityByName("CamTochka"):GetId()
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1) FlyLinked( "Povorot_cam02", CTochID, 10, 1, 1, vehLinkID ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 101, 1 )
TActivate("Nachalo_Koch_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Nachalo_Koch_cin_end")
trigger:Deactivate() end

trigger.Name: Nachalo_Koch_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2899.450, 238.413, 1204.743)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.059, 0.702, -0.060, 0.707)) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("start_koch_path") vehPlayer:LimitMaxSpeed(15) end
PlayCustomMusic("Bio01")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_Koch_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("start_koch_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("start_koch_path") vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2975.413, 226.736, 1206.434)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.001, 0.652, -0.001, 0.758)) vehPlayer:UnlimitMaxSpeed() end
local CamT = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if CamT then CamT:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TDeactivate("Nachalo_Koch_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Koch_Kavkaz_3_quest1") PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue02")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam06", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 0 ) Fly("InBase_cam07", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 18, 0, 0 ) Fly("InBase_cam08", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 4, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 102, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 103, 3 )
TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_2") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3074.520, 317.605, 515.440)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, 0.930, -0.001, 0.367)) end
TeamCreate("Boss",1040,CVector(378,405,1116),{"MirotvorecBoss"}, nil, 1)
local vehBoss = GetEntityByName("Boss_vehicle_0") if vehBoss then vehBoss:SetPosition( CVector(3363.003, 226.646, 398.331)) vehBoss:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.713, -0.000, 0.701)) vehBoss:setImmortalMode(1) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 104, 1 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 105, 1 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3303.130, 226.681, 1105.594)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, -0.013, -0.000, 1.000)) end
CreateVehicleEx("MirotvorecBoss","BossRun", CVector(3295.314, 226.685, 922.959), 1040)
local vehKar1 = GetEntityByName("BossRun") if vehKar1 then vehKar1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehKar1:SetThrottle(0) vehKar1:SetPosition( CVector(3295.314, 226.685, 922.959)) vehKar1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.019, -0.000, 1.000)) vehKar1:SetExternalPathByName("Prometeus_path") vehKar1:SetCruisingSpeed(15) end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Passage02")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TDeactivate("Nachalo_Koch_cin_vehicle") TDeactivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_1") TDeactivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_dop_2") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_Length") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin_Length
trigger.script:
local run = GetEntityByName("BossRun") local pl = GetPlayerVehicle() local len
if run and run:IsAlive() and pl and pl:IsAlive() then len = Dist(pl, run) if (70 > len) then SpawnMessageBox("8801") ShowDeathMenu() end end

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin2
trigger.script:
TDeactivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin_Length")
CompleteQuest("Koch_Kavkaz_3_quest2") PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
local Plf = GetEntityByName("BossRun") Plf:SetCruisingSpeed(0) Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = Plf:GetId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 10, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 106, 1 )
TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin2_vehicle") TActivate("Prometeus_Koch_cin2_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Prometeus_Koch_cin2_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
PassToMap("r1m2", "FromR1M5_loc", -1, true )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Na_bazy_quest1") and not(IsQuestComplete("Na_bazy_quest1")) then
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 14, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 1, 1 )
TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate() end

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3733.335, 226.674, 75.485)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.011, -0.003, -1.000)) end
PlayCustomMusic("Bio02")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TActivate("Boss_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boss_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Na_bazy_quest1")
TeamCreate("Boss",1040,CVector(378,405,1116),{"MirotvorecBoss"}, nil, 1)
local vehBoss = GetEntityByName("Boss_vehicle_0") if vehBoss then vehBoss:SetPosition( CVector(3443.947, 227.978, 392.365)) vehBoss:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.002, 0.820, -0.002, -0.573)) vehBoss:setImmortalMode(1) end
TeamCreate("DefTM1",1025,CVector(3427.489, 226.735, 478.403),{"Ural00", "Ural02", "Hunter01"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef11 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_0") if vehDef11 then vehDef11:SetPosition( CVector(3457.489, 226.735, 448.403)) end
local vehDef12 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_1") if vehDef12 then vehDef12:SetPosition( CVector(3477.489, 226.735, 498.403)) end
local vehDef13 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_2") if vehDef13 then vehDef13:SetPosition( CVector(3407.489, 226.735, 428.403)) end
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue02")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 15, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 2, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 3, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 4, 0.5 )
TActivate("Boss_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Boss_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boss_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetNameFromScript("XpomCmepTb") vehPlayer:setImmortalMode(1) end
TeamCreate("DefTM2",1025,CVector(3420.542, 226.740, 323.455),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM2_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:SetPosition( CVector(3420.542, 226.740, 323.455)) end
TeamCreate("DefTM3",1025,CVector(3290.512, 226.744, 320.518),{"Ural01", "Hunter02"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:SetPosition( CVector(3287.512, 226.744, 320.518)) end
local vehDef32 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_1") if vehDef32 then vehDef32:SetPosition( CVector(3290.512, 226.744, 327.518)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boss_cin_end
trigger.script:
CreateNewDummyObject( "concrete_tube1", "KAMEHb1", -1, -1, CVector(3644.939, 225.900, 526.969), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000),1 )
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
AllowSave(false)
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TActivate("Boss_cin_vehicleBoss")
TActivate("BossDie_cin")
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03b")
SetTolerance( 1100, 1040, RS_ENEMY )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Boss_cin_vehicleBoss
trigger.script: local vehBoss = GetEntityByName("Boss_vehicle_0") if vehBoss then vehBoss:AddModifier("hp","= 7000") end

trigger.Name: BossDie_cin_dieatack
trigger.script:
trigger:IncCount() local count = trigger:GetCount() if 3>count then return end
TActivate("BossDie_cin") TDeactivate("Boss_cin_vehicleBoss") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Battle01")
if IsQuestComplete("Annigilation_quest4") then CompleteQuest("PrometeusALT_quest") else CompleteQuest("Na_bazy_quest2") end
CreateVehicleEx("MazForPlayer01","MazPL", CVector(3903.509, 225.909, 554.884), 1100)
SetVar("PlayerCarName",GetPlayerVehicle():GetName()) GetPlayerVehicle():setGodMode(1) CapturePlayerVehicle(0, "ChCar1")
local veh=getObj("MazPL") if veh then g_Player:AddChild(veh) end
GetPlayerVehicle():SetCustomControlEnabled( false ) GetPlayerVehicle():setGodMode(0)
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 19, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 5, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 333, 0 ) AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 )
TActivate("BossDie_cin_vehicle") TActivate("BossDie_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "BossDie_cin_end" ) TDeactivate( "Boss_damage_ON_1" ) TDeactivate( "Boss_damage_OFF_1" ) TDeactivate( "Boss_damage_ON_2" ) TDeactivate( "Boss_damage_OFF_2" ) TDeactivate( "Boss_damage_ON_3" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehDef11 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_0") if vehDef11 then vehDef11:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef12 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_1") if vehDef12 then vehDef12:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef13 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_2") if vehDef13 then vehDef13:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM2_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef32 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_1") if vehDef32 then vehDef32:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef111 = GetEntityByName("DefTM11_vehicle_0") if vehDef111 then vehDef111:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM22_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM33_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef11 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_0") if vehDef11 then vehDef11:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef12 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_1") if vehDef12 then vehDef12:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef13 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_2") if vehDef13 then vehDef13:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehDef32 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_1") if vehDef32 then vehDef32:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
local vehFakePlayer = GetEntityByName("XpomCmepTb") if vehFakePlayer then vehFakePlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehFakePlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehFakePlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3443.947, 227.978, 392.365)) vehFakePlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.541, 0.003, 0.841)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
local vehFakePlayer = GetEntityByName("XpomCmepTb") if vehFakePlayer then vehFakePlayer:setImmortalMode(0) vehFakePlayer:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie_cin_end
trigger.script:
SetGameTime(23,500) SetWeather(1)
TDeactivate("BossDie_cin_dop_1")
AllowSave(true)
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
local cum1 = GetEntityByName("KAMEHb1") if cum1 then cum1:Remove() end
PassToMap("r1m2", "InBase_loc", -1, true )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Timer_bomb
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap11
trigger.script:
PassToMap("r1m1", "InBase_loc", -1, true )
TDeactivate("Timer_bomb")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo2_cin
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Annigilation_quest4") and not(IsQuestComplete("Annigilation_quest4")) then
TeamCreate("Boss",1040,CVector(378,405,1116),{"MirotvorecBoss"}, nil, 1)
local vehBoss = GetEntityByName("Boss_vehicle_0") if vehBoss then vehBoss:SetPosition( CVector(3443.947, 227.978, 392.365)) vehBoss:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.002, 0.820, -0.002, -0.573)) vehBoss:setImmortalMode(1) end
CompleteQuest("Annigilation_quest4")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 6, 1, 0 ) Fly("InBase_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 14, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 7, 0.5 )
TActivate("Nachalo2_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Nachalo2_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "Nachalo2_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate() end

trigger.Name: Nachalo2_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0)
vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3733.335, 227.979, 75.485)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.011, -0.003, -1.000)) end
PlayCustomMusic("Techno01")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo2_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue02")
AddCinematicMessage( 8, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 9, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10, 0.5 )
TeamCreate("DefTM11",1082,CVector(3537.464, 226.749, 505.813),{"CoolBelaz"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef111 = GetEntityByName("DefTM11_vehicle_0") if vehDef111 then vehDef111:SetPosition( CVector(3537.464, 226.749, 505.813)) vehDef111:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.979, -0.001, -0.203)) end TeamCreate("DefTM22",1082,CVector(3560.340, 226.747, 461.264),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM22_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:SetPosition( CVector(3560.340, 226.747, 461.264)) vehDef21:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.709, -0.001, -0.705)) end TeamCreate("DefTM33",1082,CVector(3509.717, 226.756, 482.709),{"MirotvorecShot_2"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM33_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:SetPosition( CVector(3509.717, 226.756, 482.709)) vehDef31:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.819, -0.000, -0.574)) end
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3604.664, 226.750, 519.456)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.826, -0.001, -0.563)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo2_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehDef111 = GetEntityByName("DefTM11_vehicle_0") if vehDef111 then vehDef111:Remove() end
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM22_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:Remove() end
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM33_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:Remove() end
TeamCreate("DefTM11",1082,CVector(3537.464, 226.749, 505.813),{"CoolBelaz"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef111 = GetEntityByName("DefTM11_vehicle_0") if vehDef111 then vehDef111:SetPosition( CVector(3537.464, 226.749, 505.813)) vehDef111:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.979, -0.001, -0.203)) end TeamCreate("DefTM22",1082,CVector(3560.340, 226.747, 461.264),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef21 = GetEntityByName("DefTM22_vehicle_0") if vehDef21 then vehDef21:SetPosition( CVector(3560.340, 226.747, 461.264)) vehDef21:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.709, -0.001, -0.705)) end TeamCreate("DefTM33",1082,CVector(3509.717, 226.756, 482.709),{"MirotvorecShot_2"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM33_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:SetPosition( CVector(3509.717, 226.756, 482.709)) vehDef31:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.819, -0.000, -0.574)) end
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetNameFromScript("XpomCmepTb") vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3604.664, 226.750, 519.456)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.826, -0.001, -0.563)) vehPlayer:setImmortalMode(1) end
TeamCreate("DefTM1",1082,CVector(3427.489, 226.735, 478.403),{"Ural03", "CoolBelaz", "Cruiser02"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef11 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_0") if vehDef11 then vehDef11:SetPosition( CVector(3457.489, 226.735, 448.403)) end
local vehDef12 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_1") if vehDef12 then vehDef12:SetPosition( CVector(3477.489, 226.735, 498.403)) end
local vehDef13 = GetEntityByName("DefTM1_vehicle_2") if vehDef13 then vehDef13:SetPosition( CVector(3407.489, 226.735, 428.403)) end
TeamCreate("DefTM3",1082,CVector(3290.512, 226.744, 320.518),{"CoolBelaz_3", "Cruiser02", "Ural01"}, nil, 1)
local vehDef31 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_0") if vehDef31 then vehDef31:SetPosition( CVector(3287.512, 226.744, 320.518)) end
local vehDef32 = GetEntityByName("DefTM3_vehicle_1") if vehDef32 then vehDef32:SetPosition( CVector(3290.512, 226.744, 327.518)) end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03b")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TDeactivate("Nachalo2_cin_dop_1")
TActivate("Boss_cin_vehicleBoss")
TActivate("BossDie_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie2_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("InBase_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 16, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 26, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 27, 0.5 )
TActivate("BossDie2_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "BossDie2_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie2_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3443.947, 227.978, 392.365)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.541, 0.003, 0.841)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BossDie2_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
local cum1 = GetEntityByName("KAMEHb1") if cum1 then cum1:Remove() end
PassToMap("r1m2", "InBase_loc", -1, true )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin
trigger.script:
if IsQuestTaken("Kosmodrom_quest") and not(IsQuestComplete("Kosmodrom_quest")) then
CompleteQuest("Kosmodrom_quest")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","Nezn_112", CVector(2661.519, 227.605, 989.448), 1003)
CreateNewDummyObject( "bochka5", "Bochka1", -1, -1, CVector(2697.184, 276.805, 616.870), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2143, 0.9768), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(2805.145, 286.086, 730.469), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka1", -1, -1, CVector(2808.448, 229.187, 720.527), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetEntityByName("Nezn_112") local PlfID = Plf:GetId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
local Plf1 = GetEntityByName("Bochka1") local PlfID1 = Plf1:GetId()
local CToch1 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka1") local CTochID1 = CToch1:GetId()
Fly("Povorot_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 10, 1, 0 ) FlyLinked( "Povorot_cam02", CTochID, 10, 0, 0, PlfID ) Fly("314zdec_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 0, 0 ) FlyLinked( "Povorot_cam03", CTochID1, 5, 0, 0, PlfID1 ) Fly("314zdec_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 16, 0, 0 ) Fly("314zdec_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 11, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12, 0.5 )
TActivate("Povorot_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Povorot_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Povorot_cin_dop_2") TActivate("Povorot_cin_dop_3") TActivate("Povorot_cin_dop_4") TActivate( "Povorot_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate() end

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2625.079, 227.608, 990.463)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -1.000, 0.001, -0.026)) end
local vehBand1 = GetEntityByName("Nezn_112") if vehBand1 then vehBand1:SetPosition( CVector(2661.519, 227.605, 989.448)) vehBand1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -1.000, 0.001, -0.026)) end
PlayCustomMusic("Techno01")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("PL_path") end
local vehBand1 = GetEntityByName("Nezn_112") if vehBand1 then vehBand1:SetExternalPathByName("Skorp_path") vehBand1:SetCruisingSpeed(25) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue02")
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("Bochka1") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Bochka01_path", 5 ) end
local vehBand1 = GetEntityByName("Nezn_112") if vehBand1 then vehBand1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBand1:SetThrottle(0) vehBand1:SetExternalPathByName("Skorp_path") vehBand1:PlaceToEndOfPath("Skorp_path") vehBand1:SetPosition( CVector(2730.519, 227.605, 651.448)) end
TActivate("Povorot_cin_dop_21")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_dop_21
trigger.script:
CreateEffectInsertedInRemove( "ET_PS_VEH_EXP1_MED1", CVector(2695, 225, 616), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), true ) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(2695, 225, 616), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire2", -1, -1, CVector(2695, 225, 616), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.500)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_dop_3
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 14, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 15, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 16, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 17, 0.5 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_dop_4
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Battle01")
AddCinematicMessage( 18, 0.5 )
CreateEffectInsertedInRemove( "ET_PS_VEH_EXP1_MED1", CVector(2664, 233, 599), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), true ) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(2686.004, 226.000, 614.506), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire2", -1, -1, CVector(2671.410, 242.473, 357.732), Quaternion(-0.7071, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.7071), 3.123) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire3", -1, -1, CVector(2671.410, 242.473, 357.732), Quaternion(-0.7071, 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.7071), 3.123)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Povorot_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate("Povorot_cin_dop_1") TDeactivate("Povorot_cin_dop_2") TDeactivate("Povorot_cin_dop_21") TDeactivate("Povorot_cin_dop_3") TDeactivate("Povorot_cin_dop_4")
PassToMap("r4m1", "Kosmodrom_loc", -1, true )
trigger:Deactivate()
